text.title: Wireframing Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: checkout-review screen with three layout variants + complete state coverage + mobile notes.

example.title: Variants
example.p: 1) Single-column stack (mobile-first). 2) Two-column with sticky summary (desktop). 3) Accordion sections (medium viewport).

example.title: Annotation row (pay-now button)
example.p: element="pay-now"; behaviour="submit order; disable on click"; conditional_states=["loading", "disabled-if-invalid"]; tech_requirement="POST /orders; 3-state idempotent".

example.title: State checklist
example.p: default: items + price summary visible. empty: redirect to /cart. loading: skeleton review block. error: inline error above CTA. success: navigate to /confirmation. permission_gated: read-only review for guest checkout.

example.title: Mobile notes
example.p: Stack variants only at <600px; sticky bottom bar holds the primary CTA; never disable user-scaling.

example.title: Open questions
example.p: 1) Tax position relative to shipping in summary? 2) Guest-checkout payment-method storage policy?
